titleStmt.title: SII 17.587: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 587. (A.R. No. 542 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple, right of entrance.

This inscription commences with the praśasti, Kaḍalśūḻnda pārmagaḻum, etc., of Rājādhirāja II. The details of the date given, viz., year 9, Tulā ba. are insufficient for verification. Other details are lost in the portion built in.

This records a grant of land in Rājarājan-Pōttūr alias Ammaiappanallūr, formerly a portion of Śiṟukūṟṟanallūr, in Vēḷā-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, purchased for 1500 kāśu, to god Śrīmūlasthānam-uḍaiyār of Tiruvārūr, by Paḻaiyaṉūruḍaiyāṉ Vēdavaṉamuḍaiyāṉ Ammai Appaṉ alias Pallavarājaṉ of Mēnmalai-ppaḻaivanūr (Vide Nos. 582 and 583 above).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . kaṭal cūḻnta pārumakaḷum pūmakaḷuṅ kalaimakaḷu maṭal cūḻnta pormakaḷuñ cīr makaḷu mamarntu vāḻa nāṟkaṭal cūḻ puviyeḻum pāṟkaṭal pol pukaḻ parappa Ātiyuka māmeṉṉac coti muṭi puṉaintaruḷi Aṟucamaiyamum Aimpūtamum neṟiyil vantu pāri kkat teṉṉa
cevippa Ūḻiyūḻi yoru ceṅkol Eḻupārum Initaḷippac cempoṉ virasiṁhāsanattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻāṉṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakesaripanmarāṉa tribhuva naccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu tulānāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu
meṉmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūruṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉa muṭaiyāṉ Ammai Appaṉāṉa pallavarājaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvārur śrīmūlasthāṉa muṭaiyārkkuk kāṇiyāka śrī pādattu nirvārttuk kuṭutta nāḷ rājādhirājap peruvilai koṇṭa nantiyarājarum Amarakoṉārum
ṅkacoḻap pallavarayarum puravuvariśrīkaraṇanāyakam tattainallūruṭaiyārum tirumantira Olai rājentiraciṅkamuventa veḷārum Eḻuttiṭṭa piramāṇappaṭi Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu veḷā nāṭṭu ciṟukūṟṟanallūrp piṟinta rājarājaṉ pottūrāṉa Ammaiappanallūr nilam ḷa
matitta kācu Āyirattaiñūṟu Ikkācu Āyirattaiñūṟum Oṭukki Iṉṉīlam nāṟ taraiye Orumāmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ Oṉpatumāvaraiyum nāṉ koṇṭa piramāṇappaṭiye nāyaṉār śrī pāda ttile nirvārttuk kāṇiyākak kuṭuttu Inta rājādhirājap peruvilaippiramāṇaThe inscription is built in at the right end.
Digital edition of SII 17.587 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
